# KinMate Site v1.0.0

## Release Date
2026-06-06

## Summary
This release aligns the marketing site with the KinMate launch subscription rules, including the 60-day trial, the Family 3 and Family 8 hot badges, and the Family 8 lifetime offer price.

## What's New
- Pricing page updated for the 60-day launch trial
- Family 3 and Family 8 both highlighted as hot plans
- Family 8 lifetime offer displayed at $199.99 with $399.99 original price
- Launch promo dialog added to the pricing page

## Changed
- English and Chinese pricing copy were aligned with the app paywall
- Site docs are rebuilt through the static export workflow
- Subscription-related landing page messaging was tightened for overseas users

## Fixed
- Removed stale 14-day trial wording from the public pricing content
- Removed copy mismatches between the source messages and generated docs

## Notes
- This site release note should stay in sync with the app release note for the same product version.
- If the pricing rules change later, update both repositories together.
